text.p: I receipt your letter dated 20th of may, 2007 and the gift envoloped Inside , and your am very grateful. How is the United State of America ? your studies and how are you adapting to new life style?

Before I forget, the recent national Population and housing census in nigeria has come and gone Nigerians been In doubt about the accuracy of the total populations of nigerians. The national population commission of nigeria (APCN), Just last week released the census figure state that , nigerians figure / Populatein is now 140 million. By so doing, the country stand to gain aid from Internatinal communities where debt will be given to her. Now that we have known the total Population of Nigerians, the citizenry stand to gain alot of benefits from the federal government , In area of Unemployment, now that figure are there the goverment will use it to contol Unemployment In the country. seoncd

Secondly, the citizenry to stand to gain from the last Census where the federal government will use the figure for revenue allocation to each state of the federation. lastly, the federal government will use the population figure to checkmate Inflation In the country.

, before I forget, the exercise of the populatein was very Interesting, the way the census staff will asked detailed of your personal life, your local government area, your names, your state of the way you will use your Left han finger to thump print and so on and so for.
, your reply will be is highly
